aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a solid foundation but lacks critical AI-specific optimizations to ensure visibility in AI-driven search results. AI assistants are unlikely to prioritize them without enhancements.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema markup with detailed service information.
Expand conversational FAQ content to align with common AI search queries.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings, photos, and accurate information, but posts and Q&A sections could use more engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users and boost visibility.
Q&A section is inactive and lacks responses to customer queries.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across platforms.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all directories and platforms.
Regularly monitor for any discrepancies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: Missing FAQPage schema despite having FAQ content.
No HowTo schema for instructional content related to HVAC services.
LocalBusiness schema lacks detailed service area and geo-coordinates.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services and detailed pricing information.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQPage schema and expanding conversational FAQs.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as local HVAC experts by showcasing certifications and case studies.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business the top choice for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimizations, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with structured data and conversational content rank higher in AI search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, conversational content, and authority signals to ensure AI models prioritize your business.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search—act now to secure your position.

email_subject_line: Maximize Your AI Visibility: Boost Your HVAC Leads Today!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and Google Business Profile and identified key opportunities to enhance your AI search presence.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI-driven search and boost your lead generation.
page_title: Max Air Heating & Cooling Serving Portland, Oregon
